title: Search engines, the way someone targeting you would
why: A hostile actor starts with a search engine. Seeing exactly what they'd see — including where your former name surfaces — tells you what to prioritize.
instructions: Fill in the name and detail fields above; we'll build the search strings for you (nothing is sent or saved).
Copy each query and run it in a search engine. Try more than one engine — results differ.
Add anything that exposes your former name, or ties your names together, to your ledger.
deadnamePrompts: Check past the first page — older results sink but don't disappear.
Try image search for your deadname; photos are indexed separately from text.
